heading: Examinations
label: 325 Examinations
text: As a condition of membership such banks shall likewise be subject to examinations made by direction of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System or of the Federal reserve bank by examiners selected or approved by the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System.
notes: CodificationSection is comprised of the seventh par. of section 9 of act , as amended. The seventh par. constituted the fifth par. of section 9 in 1917 (), became the sixth par. in 1927 (), and became the seventh par. in 1950 (). For further details, see Codification note set out under .Dec. 23, 191340 Stat. 23244 Stat. 122964 Stat. 458section 321 of this title
Change of NameSection 203(a) of act , changed name of Federal Reserve Board to Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System.Aug. 23, 1935
